headline: Strong Leasing at 360 Park Avenue South Might Change The Case For Investing In BXP (BXP)
summary: BXP, Inc. previously announced that its Board declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of US$0.70 per share for the January 1 to March 31, 2026 period, payable on April 30, 2026 to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026. Earlier in March, BXP announced long-term leases totaling about 230,000 square feet at 360 Park Avenue South, lifting occupancy above 90% and underscoring that well-located, amenity-rich offices in Midtown South continue to attract diverse, well-funded tenants. We’ll...
